---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem / Motivation

A clear description of the problem or need this feature would address.

## Proposed Solution

Describe how you'd like this to work.

## Acceptance Criteria

Concrete, testable conditions that must hold for this feature to be considered done.
Use checkboxes; each item must be verifiable without ambiguity.

- [ ] ...
- [ ] ...

## Out of Scope

What this issue explicitly does **not** cover. Helps prevent scope creep when an
agent or contributor picks this up.

## Dependencies

Other issues or external changes this depends on (e.g., `depends on #3`). Leave
empty if none.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative solutions or workarounds you've considered.

## Additional Context

Any other context, mockups, or examples about the feature request.
